data.title: VCI Global launches the world's first NVIDIA Blackwell-powered enterprise AI GPU Lounge. introduces new asset-light model.
data.description: The opening of V Gallant's Co-Working Data Center and IDEX Exchange Hub marks the merging of high-performance computing and physical AI infrastructure. This development signifies a significant step forward in harnessing the power of advanced technologies, with a focus on collaboration and innovation. The center and hub are designed to provide a cutting-edge environment for startups and established businesses alike to utilize state-of-the-art facilities and equipment. The integration of these platforms highlights the increasing demand for seamless connectivity between digital and physical systems as part of the evolving technological landscape.

data.title: Dow rises by 250 points, S&P 500 approaches milestone. Chip testing stock surges post earnings.
data.description: On Friday afternoon, the Dow Jones index surged approximately 250 points. A stock related to chip testing saw a significant increase following its earnings report. Today's stock market showed positive movement with the Dow Jones inching closer to a milestone, while an aerospace company indicated a bullish signal. The mentioned news was live coverage from Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Larian Studios confirms Divinity game won't feature AI art. Head Swen Vincke says benefits of tech still recognized.
data.description: Swen Vincke, the head of Larian Studios, has stated that the forthcoming RPG Divinity will not be incorporating generative AI art. Despite this decision, the studio acknowledges the advantages associated with this technology.

data.title: Renasant Corp (NYSE: RNST) to report Q4 2025 results on Jan 27, 2026, with webcast on Jan 28, 2026, 10 AM EST.
data.description: Renasant Corporation, trading under the NYSE symbol RNST, is scheduled to reveal its fourth-quarter results for 2025 after the NYSE closes on January 27, 2026. Following this, an executive management quarterly webcast and conference call with analysts will take place on January 28, 2026, at 10:00 AM Eastern Time (9:00 AM Central Time).

data.title: Bipartisan support crucial for CLARITY Act; if crypto bill fails in next week's vote, won't be reconsidered until 2026 - analyst Alex Thorn.
data.description: Analyst Alex Thorn suggests that if the crypto market structure bill does not pass in the upcoming vote, it is unlikely to be revisited for a second vote until 2026. This puts significant pressure on the upcoming vote as the potential implications of the decision are substantial for the crypto market. The bill's fate hangs in the balance as stakeholders eagerly await the outcome of the upcoming vote, recognizing the potential long-term repercussions of this critical legislative decision.
